step_rationale: Chemokine associated with leukocyte recruitment and MACE risk.
mechanism: MIP-3α (CCL20) is a chemokine that recruits lymphocytes and monocytes, contributing to post-MI inflammation and adverse remodeling.

references.title: Inflammatory biomarkers and risk of cardiovascular events in patients undergoing coronary angiography.
